'''Wilpiet''' was a terrestrial celestial body<ref name="AIR" /> located in the [[Wilpiet system/Legends|Wilpiet system]], a part of the [[Cademimu sector/Legends|Cademimu sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] maintained a depot there. A group of Alliance operatives that used the [[Simiyiar-class light freighter|''Simiyiar''-class light freighter]] ''[[Waterspire]]'' operated in Wilpiet's vicinity. Less than two [[Standard month/Legends|months]] prior to<ref name="AIR" /> some point by [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the [[Kerestian/Legends|Kerestian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Milacass]] stole the ''Waterspire'' from the Wilpiet depot, as a result becoming wanted for theft and destruction of Alliance property.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Wilpiet was mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently placed the Wilpiet [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square M-6.<ref name="TEA" />
